title: FlameFrags Totem of Undying
description: This Resource Pack makes the Totem of Undying FlameFrags from Unstable Universe!
body: This Resource Pack makes the totem of Undying FlameFrags's skin and removes the old squidward totem texture into a 3D Model of FlameFrags The Immortal Demon, Please Download This Took 2 hours to make.......
